column3: Member + Non-member company + General public + FFIE administrator
column4: Member login, public access without login, differentiated navigation according to profiles, role and rights management, and secure integration with existing FFIE member systems.
Display of articles, press releases, events and editorial content, with categories, chronological display and detailed reading.
Synchronization of existing documents from the FFIE site, structuring of the document library, consultation, downloading, filtering and searching by category.
A section for the general public presenting careers in the electrical industry through job descriptions, educational content and presentation videos.
Playback of video and multimedia content within the application.
Section presenting the FFIE partners mentioned in the proposal: Qualifelec, Consuel and OPPBTP, with links to their platforms.
Notifications sent to users when new content or important information is published.
Caching of viewed content to allow faster access and limited viewing without login.
Securing exchanges, managing personal data and complying with GDPR obligations.
Web interface allowing FFIE teams to manage content, documents, news, videos, users and notifications.
Phase 2 — Space dedicated to educational content: video tutorials, practical sheets, technical guides, filters, categories and search.
Phase 2 — Module integrating business calculation tools and offering the first calculators defined by the FFIE.
